name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified
notes: This Building Block identifies applications or services installed or modified categories.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Application Modification, System.Service Installed, System.Registry Addition, System.Application Installed
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Application Modification, System.Service Installed, System.Registry Addition, System.Application Installed
